product_depth.justification: All 4 agent/role files updated with complete authenticity instructions. Generator has 4 DO items, evaluator has 4 VERIFY checks. Dual-side control is symmetric and complete.
product_depth.drift_check: Same as prior round. Scope is similar (additive Markdown documentation).

functionality.justification: Generator checklist integrates with Sprint Round Sequence. Evaluator gate is step 5 after step 4. Role references point to correct agent file sections. Integration points verified programmatically.
functionality.drift_check: Same as prior round. Both rounds add well-integrated sections to existing files.

visual_design.justification: Heading hierarchy matches existing patterns in all 4 files (H3 subsections, H2 sections). Table formatting in evaluator.md matches existing tables.
visual_design.drift_check: Same as prior round. Documentation structure quality is consistent.

code_quality.justification: Zero domain-specific terminology (automated scan across all 4 files). Consistent terminology. Generator DO corresponds to evaluator VERIFY. Role references concise without duplication.
code_quality.drift_check: Same as prior round. Terminology discipline maintained.

contract_checks.evidence: 4 numbered items in generator.md checklist mapping to coherence, intentionality, craft, fitness_for_purpose
4 dimension checks in evaluator.md table with verification methods
Checklist placed under Sprint Round Sequence, before Post-Implementation Commit
Gate rules state 'binary pass/fail' and 'any dimension fails, the round FAILS -- regardless of domain criteria scores'
roles/generator.md references 'Pre-Implementation Checklist from the generator agent file'; roles/evaluator.md references 'evaluator agent file under step 5'
Heading hierarchy consistent across all 4 files
Automated keyword scan for domain-specific terms returned zero matches across all 4 files

feature_evidence.reason: All 5 verification steps satisfied: checklist exists in generator.md, 4 items mapping to 4 dimensions, generic language, integrates with Sprint Round Sequence.
All 4 verification steps satisfied: Authenticity section in roles/generator.md, references checklist without duplication, generic language.
All 6 verification steps satisfied: step 5 after step 4, 4 dimension checks with verification methods, binary pass/fail, override rule, generic language.
All 4 verification steps satisfied: Authenticity Gate section in roles/evaluator.md, references post-grading gate without duplication, generic language.

codex_detection.fallback_reason: Changes are Markdown documentation files, not executable code. Codex adversarial code review is not meaningful for documentation-only changes.

coherence.justification: All 4 files use identical dimension names. Generator DO items correspond to evaluator VERIFY checks. Role references consistently point to their agent file counterparts.

intentionality.justification: Evaluator verification methods are harness-specific (e.g., 'Check the builder report Authenticity self-check section'). Generator checklist instructs reporting in builder report. These are project-specific cross-references, not generic templates.

craft.justification: Heading hierarchy follows existing patterns in each file. Generator.md uses H3 matching existing subsections. Evaluator.md step numbering follows 0-4 sequence. Role files use H2 matching existing sections.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Generator agents can follow the checklist without additional context. Evaluator agents can apply the gate without additional context. Role references provide enough summary to know what to do and where to find details.
